headline: BlackBerry Set to Post Q4 Earnings: What Investors Need to Know
summary: BB heads into Q4 earnings with QNX growth, Secure Communications strength, rising cash flow and government deals amid macro and auto sector risks.

headline: How The Investment Story For J.B. Hunt (JBHT) Is Shifting After The Freight Rally
summary: The updated fair value estimate for J.B. Hunt Transport Services has shifted to US$211.87 from US$211.17, reflecting a modest reset in expectations rather than a sharp rethink. This aligns with recent analyst commentary that mixes optimism about the freight recovery and sector rally with caution that some upside may already be reflected in trucking stocks. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative could shape the way you track J.B. Hunt from here. Stay updated as the Fair Value...
